criteria.label: Thesis Statement
criteria.description: Clear, specific, and arguable claim stated in the introduction. Should present a debatable position on the topic.

criteria.label: Evidence & Support
criteria.description: Uses relevant, credible sources to support claims. Evidence is integrated smoothly and cited appropriately.

criteria.label: Analysis & Reasoning
criteria.description: Explains how evidence supports the thesis. Makes logical connections between ideas. Shows critical thinking.

criteria.label: Organization & Structure
criteria.description: Clear introduction, body paragraphs with topic sentences, logical flow, effective transitions, strong conclusion.

criteria.label: Writing Mechanics
criteria.description: Proper grammar, spelling, punctuation, and formatting. Academic tone and style. Sentence variety.
